name: Design Critique
description: One agent presents work, one critiques it, one synthesises the outcome.

phases.name: Present
phases.prompt: Explain the work, goals, constraints, and what feedback you need.

phases.name: Critique
phases.prompt: Identify strengths, weaknesses, risks, and concrete improvements. Provide your own independent analysis.

phases.name: Synthesis
phases.prompt: Turn the discussion into prioritised recommendations: what to keep, what to change, what to investigate.
